title: BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: The Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has officially announced the Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at bel-india.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years and hold a degree in any discipline (Pass Class) from a recognized university can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

basic_details.job_title: BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) has officially announced the Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at bel-india.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 40 years and hold a degree in any discipline (Pass Class) from a recognized university can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: OBC(NCL): 03 Years, SC/ST: 05 Years, Ex-Servicemen: additional 05 Years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in any discipline (Pass Class from a recognized University)
qualification.details: Degree in any discipline (Pass Class from a recognized University)

selection_process: Written Test (85 marks) Interview (15 marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BEL Assistant Security Officer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BEL Assistant Security Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the BEL Assistant Security Officer posts is 02-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Security Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the Assistant Security Officer position in Bharat Electronics Limited.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in any discipline with Pass Class from a recognized University to be eligible for the Assistant Security Officer role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Assistant Security Officer position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Assistant Security Officer post is 40 years as of 01-05-2026.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the BEL Assistant Security Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Security Officer post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 1,20,000/- per month, along with admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Security Officer role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test of 85 marks, followed by an Interview of 15 marks, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the Assistant Security Officer position?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can apply online through the official BEL website or the direct 'Apply Online' link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Does BEL offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, BEL offers age relaxation for OBC(NCL) by 03 years, for SC/ST by 05 years, and for Ex-Servicemen by an additional 05 years.
